overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a science fiction video game showing a character in a spacesuit exploring an industrial control room facility. The character ascends a metal stairwell, passes through an automatic doorway, and walks through a dimly lit control room filled with computer consoles and monitoring equipment before turning toward an exit.

events.description: character passes through automatic doorway from narrow corridor into larger control room

agents.ego_description: ascending metal stairs toward the automatic door at the end of the corridor

entered.detail: metal grated stairs with yellow safety markings leading upward
beige industrial wall with pipes and electrical panels
beige industrial wall with ventilation grates
metal door frame leading to the control room

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow industrial corridor, ascending a metal staircase toward an automatic doorway. The walls are lined with pipes and panels, and the lighting is dim and artificial.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial control room with monitoring stations

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the control room between rows of computer consoles and monitoring equipment

entered.detail: rows of desks with glowing green monitor screens
tall white cabinet units with multiple compartments
large cylindrical support column with metal bands
long fluorescent light fixtures hanging from ceiling pipes
large windows showing industrial exterior or space view
large glowing holographic projection on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a spacious industrial control room filled with computer consoles, office chairs, and monitoring equipment. The room features a large holographic display on the left wall and a window wall at the far end, with fluorescent lighting illuminating the concrete floor.

events.description: character stops facing the window wall and turns right toward the exit door

agents.ego_description: turning toward the right side of the room and walking toward the exit door

entered.detail: metal industrial door with warning stripes and control panel
dark metal storage lockers near the exit

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the main console area and walks toward an exit door on the right side of the room. The holographic display remains visible to the left as the character approaches the metal exit door, passing dark storage cabinets.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cramped industrial passageway into a wide, high-tech control center. It begins with the character ascending a metal staircase through a narrow corridor lined with pipes and dim artificial lighting. As the character passes through an automatic doorway, the space abruptly expands into a spacious control room filled with computer consoles, office chairs, and a large holographic display. The scene then shifts as the character moves across the concrete floor, leaving the glow of the monitoring equipment behind. Finally, the camera turns away from the main console area to follow the character past dark storage cabinets toward a metal exit door on the right.
